name: Applicability Boundary review for Acceptable Use Operational Training Augmentation Update bundle
summary: Accepted. The applicability section now covers summative and institutional/accountability contexts only for controlled augmentation or stress testing, and it leaves additional state programs, vendors, licensure, placement, promotion, and grade-bearing deployments as unknown unless separately reviewed.

findings.claim_or_issue: One New Mexico MSSA technical report should not be generalized into a universal acceptable-use policy for all high-stakes automated scoring.
findings.why_it_matters: Applicability boundaries need to track stakes, governance, and evidence provenance.
findings.recommended_action: Keep the staged unknown_or_unreviewed_contexts and next action to search more operational technical reports and policy documentation.
